title: Audit Committee - April 30, 2026
meeting_location: Champlain Room, 110 Laurier Avenue West, and by electronic participation

agenda_items.title: Notices and meeting information for meeting participants and the public

attachments.attachment_title: Public Notices English - Hybrid Standing Committee 2025 (AODA).pdf
Public Notices French - Hybrid Standing Committee 2025 (AODA).pdf

agenda_items.description:
Notices and meeting information are attached to the agenda and minutes, including: availability of simultaneous interpretation and accessibility accommodations; in camera meeting procedures; information items not subject to discussion; personal information disclaimer for correspondents and public speakers; notices regarding minutes; and hybrid participation details.
Accessible formats and communication supports are available, upon request.
Except where otherwise indicated, reports requiring Council consideration will be presented to Council on May 13, 2026 in Audit Committee Report 17.
The deadline to register by phone to speak, or submit written comments or visual presentations is 4 pm on Wednesday April 29, and the deadline to register to speak by email is 8:30 am on Thursday, April 30.
agenda_items.minutes:
The start time of the meeting was delayed from 9:30 am to 9:45 am.
These “Summary Minutes” indicate the disposition of items and actions taken at the meeting. This document does not include all of the text that will be included in the full Minutes, such as the record of written and oral submissions. Recorded votes and dissents contained in the Summary Minutes are draft until the full Minutes of the meeting are confirmed by the Committee. The draft of the full Minutes (for confirmation) will be published with the agenda for the next regular Committee meeting and, once confirmed, will replace this document.

agenda_items.title: Declarations of Interest
agenda_items.minutes: No Declarations of Interest were filed.

sub_agendas_items.title: Office of the Auditor General (OAG) – Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds

Document 1 French – Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds.pdf
Document 2 English – Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds - Highlights.pdf
Document 2 French – Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds - Highlights.pdf

motions.motion_text:
Report Recommendation(s)
That the Audit Committee receive the audit report and recommend that Council consider and approve the recommendations.
Carried with Councillors D. Brown and D. Hill dissenting on Recommendation 1 contained within Document 1 (Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds).

BE IT RESOLVED THAT the Audit Committee approve the addition of the Office of the Auditor General’s report entitled “Audit of Cash-in-Lieu of Parkland Funds,” dated April 29, 2026, and published after the agenda, pursuant to subsection 89(3) of the Procedure By-law (being by-law no. 2025-100) to allow for consideration of this report.

agenda_items.minutes: There were no in camera items.

agenda_items.minutes: There were no Notices of Motion.
